author: codex-agent

patch.value: Current deduplication requires ad-hoc scripting. This feature will provide repeatable cluster generation for near-duplicate titles (run loops, alert families, repetitive trackers), canonical selection hints, and safe preview output for maintainers before applying close_reason mappings.
Automate duplicate-cluster detection and canonical mapping report
Add a deterministic command/reporting workflow that groups similar pm items, proposes canonical records, and emits supersession mappings before mutation.
A deterministic command or report output groups duplicate candidates, identifies canonical item candidates, and produces auditable mapping output that can be reviewed before any mutation operations.
Scope, candidate clustering rules, and expected output contract are documented with linked files/tests/docs.
Makes dedupe operations reproducible and reviewable
Lowers risk of inconsistent supersession decisions across agents
Duplicate-management workflow becomes deterministic and auditable
Governance pass required manual clustering and should be productized for future runs.
Run search/list/context inventory and manually cluster near-duplicate titles; compare with scripted clustering output.
Maintainers get faster and safer duplicate management for large trackers.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence pm context --limit 10; pm search duplicate cluster consolidation automation --limit 20; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because no dedicated automation feature exists for duplicate-cluster reporting.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Initial governance pass required custom scripts for similarity clustering and canonical mapping across 9 duplicate families.

message: Create feature for duplicate-cluster automation follow-up | explicit_unset=learnings,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,fixed_version

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Normalization decision: this open dedupe-automation feature remains active and is reparented from closed governance epic pm-wtsp to active governance epic pm-5rjn to restore active lineage integrity.

author: codex-agent
message: Reparent active dedupe feature to open governance epic during normalization
